PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?player ?player_name WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P166 wd:Q28455235 .
  ?player p:P166 ?award_claim .
  ?award_claim pq:P585 ?award_year .
  ?player p:P1001 ?team_claim .
  ?team_claim ps:P1001 ?team .
  ?superbowl wdt:P31 wd:Q4498214 .
  ?superbowl wdt:P585 ?sbs_year .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?sbs_year) , 1 , 4) = SUBSTR(STR(?award_year) , 1 , 4))
  .
  ?superbowl wdt:P1545 ?sb_winner .
  FILTER(?team != ?sb_winner)
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player rdfs:label ?player_name .
    FILTER(LANG(?player_name) = 'en')
  }
}
